problems.details: Custom event name is too generic and reduces readability.
problems.why_it_matters: Generic custom event names reduce graph readability and make debugging harder.
problems.likely_impact: Harder to understand intent and event ownership later.
problems.suggested_fix: Rename the custom event to reflect intent.

problems.why_it_matters: This node is reporting an explicit editor/runtime error state.
problems.likely_impact: The graph may fail to compile or behave incorrectly at runtime.
problems.suggested_fix: Open the graph, inspect the node error, and fix the broken connection, invalid reference, or missing asset.

problems.why_it_matters: Repeated GetActorOfClass increases coupling and assumes a stable singleton-like level composition.
problems.likely_impact: Makes the Blueprint harder to scale and more fragile across maps or tests.
problems.suggested_fix: Resolve references centrally via GameInstance, subsystem, bootstrap actor, or cached refs.

problems.details: Graph contains 63 nodes and may be too large.
problems.why_it_matters: Large graphs are harder to debug, reason about, and safely refactor.

problems.details: Save/sync-related graph does not appear to write any obvious runtime state before syncing.
problems.why_it_matters: A save/sync graph does not appear to write state before syncing.
problems.likely_impact: Persisted state may drift from runtime state.
problems.suggested_fix: Confirm whether state is already current; otherwise write state before sync.

problems.details: Reference variables are read but no branch/switch nodes were detected in this graph.
problems.why_it_matters: Reference variables appear to be used without obvious branching validation in this graph.
problems.likely_impact: May cause null access or fallback bugs if the reference can be invalid.
problems.suggested_fix: Confirm whether the reference is guaranteed valid here; otherwise add IsValid/branch protection.
